title: ericameria lignumviridis
intro: Ericameria lignumviridis, also known as Bigberry greasewood or Lignumviridis, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ericameria lignumviridis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and colds, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ericameria lignumviridis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
